keywords.name: I don't remember my name, neither my days as a mortal.
keywords.job: Once I was Vashresamun's favourite handmaiden. But I have fallen from her grace and now I am exiled from her tomb.
keywords.grace: Do not ask about that, mortal. Memories bring too much grief.
keywords.fallen: Do not ask about that, mortal. Memories bring too much grief.
keywords.exiled: Do not ask about that, mortal. Memories bring too much grief.
keywords.vashresamun: I mourn the dark day I was exiled from her tomb.
keywords.tomb: Her tomb is sealed and can only be entered by a certain melody.
keywords.melody: Vashresamun erased the memory of the tune from my mind, I only remember its name: the secret of the rose garden.

texts: Once I was Vashresamun's favourite handmaiden. But I have fallen from her grace and now I am exiled from her tomb.
